markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to discuss Okta's engagement with growthx.ai for pipeline generation and marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auth0 (under Okta) faces challenges with declining inbound traffic and slow internal processes](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Focus is on reviving Auth0 brand, improving pipeline generation, and running targeted experiments](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Key opportunities: leveraging Auth0's domain authority, focusing on developer engagement, and streamlining account targeting processes](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Collaboration with developer marketing team and faster execution of marketing initiatives are crucial](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### Auth0 vs Okta Business Context

  - [Okta Inc. owns both Okta (employee SSO) and Auth0 (external-facing SSO)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Auth0 focuses on customer identity and access management (CIAM)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Auth0 brand performs better than Okta branding for Auth0 products](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Revenue and pipeline generation are key priorities for Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Target Audience and ICP

  - [Primary focus: Engineering and product orgs, digital transformation leads, IAM teams](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Key verticals: Retail, hospitality, B2B SaaS, FinServe, healthcare, media, entertainment](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Emerging trends: AI agents, non-human identities, fine-grained authorization](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Security roles are a potential new target audience](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

### Pipeline Generation Challenges

  - [Inbound leads declining (previously a major source)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Current split: \~50% inbound, \~50% outbound (ads, events, SDR efforts)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Marketing contributes to \~80% of pipeline and revenue](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Slow internal processes hinder quick execution of marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

### Experimental Approach

  - [Focus on use case-specific experiments aligned with business narratives](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Explore competitive takedowns and emerging trends (e.g., AI authentication)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)
  - [Test experiences for nuanced industries and revenue models](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)
  - [No strict "no-go" areas identified, but careful coordination with developer marketing team required](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2574.0)

### Auth0's Unique Strengths

  - [Strong domain authority (22.5 million backlinks)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
  - [Developer-friendly documentation and UI/UX](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Modular and extensible authentication pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)

### Internal Challenges

  - [Slow processes for account targeting and list management (e.g., 6 weeks to tag Akamai customer list)](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3020.0)
  - [Disconnect between developer marketing and other marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Decline in developer-focused content and events](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to send follow-up and schedule additional deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3494.0)
  - [Rachael to share existing use cases, experiments, and relevant materials](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3523.0)
  - [Explore ways to streamline account targeting and list management processes](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3359.0)
  - [Investigate opportunities to leverage Auth0's domain authority and revive developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3292.0)
  - [Develop strategy for collaboration with developer marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3462.0)
  - [Create plan for running targeted experiments in key verticals and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/bUZ_Lx3eom7AYaD6sMNdwCgrq915mxzN?tab=summary&timestamp=3510.0)
